channel.title: SEC Consult Vulnerability Lab — recent CVEs
channel.description: Most recent CVEs assigned by SEC Consult Vulnerability Lab (sec-vlab).

image.title: SEC Consult Vulnerability Lab — recent CVEs

item.title: CVE-2025-10560 · 9.3 CRITICAL 🌩️ — Hardcoded cloud credentials in Worksnaps client application binaries expose production cloud resources
item.description: Worksnaps before version 1.6.20260201 contains hardcoded cloud credentials and related secret material in the Worksnaps client application binaries. The exposed credentials included AWS access keys, S3 bucket names, and related cloud access informati…

item.title: CVE-2026-11858 · 8.4 HIGH — Missing authorization in Quanos SCHEMA ST4 Client Update Service allows arbitrary file overwrite as SYSTEM
item.description: Quanos SCHEMA ST4 on-premises contains a local privilege escalation vulnerability in the Client Update Service. The update service runs as NT AUTHORITY\SYSTEM and exposes a .NET Remoting interface over a named pipe without sufficient access controls…

item.title: CVE-2026-11857 · 8.4 HIGH — Insecure .NET Remoting deserialization in Quanos SCHEMA ST4 Client Update Service allows local privilege escalation
item.description: Quanos SCHEMA ST4 on-premises contains a local privilege escalation vulnerability in the Client Update Service due to insecure deserialization in the .NET Remoting service. The service is configured with TypeFilterLevel.Full and is bound to local int…

item.title: CVE-2026-12225 · 8.7 HIGH — syracom Secure Login (2FA) for Confluence allows 2FA bypass via spoofed User-Agent
item.description: syracom AG Secure Login (2FA) for Atlassian Jira, Confluence, and Bitbucket 3.4.0.x contains an authentication bypass vulnerability. An attacker with valid credentials for a user account can bypass the two-factor authentication flow by sending HTTP r…

item.title: CVE-2026-34030 · 6.9 MEDIUM — Improper branch-code validation in Wertheim SafeController Software allows file path manipulation
item.description: The Wertheim SafeController Software, AssemblyVersion 6.15.8328.28014, does not sufficiently validate the branch code when a new branch is created. The branch code is later used in multiple application functions, including filesystem path generation…

item.title: CVE-2026-34029 · 6.8 MEDIUM — Hard-coded cryptographic key in Wertheim SafeController Software allows decryption of sensitive configuration data
item.description: The Wertheim SafeController Software, AssemblyVersion 6.15.8328.28014, contains a hard-coded cryptographic key in the SafeSystem.Infrastructure.Security.dll component. An attacker with access to the application files can reverse engineer the DLL and…

item.title: CVE-2026-34028 · 6.9 MEDIUM 🌩️ — Unauthenticated direct access to web data in Wertheim SafeController Software exposes files
item.description: The Wertheim SafeController Software, AssemblyVersion 6.15.8328.28014, exposes web-accessible file paths that are not protected by an authorization scheme. An unauthenticated attacker can directly access HTTP endpoints to download files from location…

item.title: CVE-2026-34027 · 5.3 MEDIUM — Upload restriction bypass in Wertheim SafeController Software allows authenticated users to upload arbitrary files
item.description: The Wertheim SafeController Software, AssemblyVersion 6.15.8328.28014, contains insufficient server-side file type validation in the /safe/contract/uploadcustomdocuments endpoint. The application validates uploaded files based on the user-controlled…

item.title: CVE-2026-34026 · 7.1 HIGH — Path traversal in Wertheim SafeController Software allows authenticated users to download arbitrary files
item.description: Wertheim SafeController Software, AssemblyVersion 6.15.8328.28014, contains a path traversal vulnerability in the documentName parameter of the /safe/selfservice/openselfservicedocument endpoint. The application constructs a file path using attacker-…

item.title: CVE-2026-34025 · 5.3 MEDIUM — IP restriction bypass in Wertheim SafeController Software allows logins from unauthorized network locations
item.description: The Wertheim SafeController Software, AssemblyVersion 6.15.8328.28014, contains an IP restriction bypass vulnerability in the login process. The application restricts user logins based on the IP address associated with a branch location, but the clie…

item.title: CVE-2026-34024 · 8.6 HIGH — Missing authorization checks in Wertheim SafeController Software allow low-privileged users to access restricted functions
item.description: The Wertheim SafeController Software, AssemblyVersion 6.15.8328.28014, contains missing authorization checks on multiple web application endpoints. An authenticated attacker with minimal privileges can access endpoints that are not visible in the fro…

item.title: CVE-2026-34023 · 7.1 HIGH — Broken WebSocket authorization in Wertheim SafeController Software allows cross-branch access to restricted functions
item.description: The Wertheim SafeController Software, AssemblyVersion 6.15.8328.28014, contains an incorrect authorization vulnerability in the WebSocket communication used by the SafeController WebMessageBroker. An authenticated attacker with valid low-privileged b…

item.title: CVE-2026-34022 · 7.1 HIGH — Weak custom cryptography and hard-coded keys in Wertheim SafeController 65000 allow traffic decryption
item.description: The Wertheim SafeController Family 65000, Controller 65000 - AssemblyVersion 6.11.8130.22319, uses weak custom cryptographic algorithms with hard-coded cryptographic keys to protect communication. An attacker in an adversary-in-the-middle position ca…

item.title: CVE-2026-34021 · 8.6 HIGH — Lack of cryptographic protection in Wertheim SafeController 5400 enables RS-485 message sniffing and replay
item.description: The Wertheim SafeController 5400, Controller 5400 - AssemblyVersion 6.11.8130.22320, uses RS-485 communication between the server and the microcontroller without cryptographic protection. An attacker with access to the communication path between the…

item.title: CVE-2026-24065 · 8.1 HIGH 🌩️ — Local Privilege Escalation via Insecure XPC Client Validation in Waves Central for macOS
item.description: Waves Central for macOS versions 13.0.9 through 16.5.5 contain a local privilege escalation vulnerability in the privileged helper service. The helper validates connecting XPC clients using the client process identifier (PID) to verify code-signing i…

item.title: CVE-2025-10539 · 4.8 MEDIUM 🌩️ — Improper TLS Certificate Validation RCE via Malicious Update in DeskTime Time Tracking App
item.description: Due to improper TLS certificate validation in the DeskTime Time Tracking App before version 1.3.674, attackers who can position themselves in the network path between the client and the DeskTime update servers can return a malicious executable in res…

item.title: CVE-2025-10549 · 5.1 MEDIUM — DLL Hijacking in EfficientLab Controlio Leads to Local Privilege Escalation
item.description: EfficientLab Controlio before v1.3.95 contains a DLL hijacking vulnerability caused by weak folder permissions in the installation directory. A local attacker can place a specially crafted DLL in this directory and achieve arbitrary code execution wi…

item.title: CVE-2026-24069 · 5.4 MEDIUM — Improper Enforcement of Disabled Accounts in WebUI SSO in Kiuwan SAST
item.description: Kiuwan SAST improperly authorizes SSO logins for locally disabled mapped user accounts, allowing disabled users to continue accessing the application. Kiuwan Cloud was affected, and Kiuwan SAST on-premise (KOP) was affected before 2.8.2509.4.

item.title: CVE-2026-24068 · 8.8 HIGH — Missing XPC Client & NSXPC endpoint validation leads to privilege escalation in Vienna Assistant (MacOS) - Vienna Symphonic Library
item.description: The VSL privileged helper does utilize NSXPC for IPC. The implementation of the "shouldAcceptNewConnection" function, which is used by the NSXPC framework to validate if a client should be allowed to connect to the XPC listener, does not validate cli…

item.title: CVE-2026-24063 · 8.2 HIGH — World-writable uninstall script executed as root in Arturia Software Center
item.description: When a plugin is installed using the Arturia Software Center (MacOS), it also installs an uninstall.sh bash script in a root owned path. This script is written to disk with the file permissions 777, meaning it is writable by any user. When uninstalli…

item.title: CVE-2026-24062 · 7.8 HIGH — Insufficient XPC Client validation leading to local privilege escalation in Arturia Software Center
item.description: The "Privileged Helper" component of the Arturia Software Center (MacOS) does not perform sufficient client code signature validation when a client connects. This leads to an attacker being able to connect to the helper and execute privileged actions…

item.title: CVE-2025-10010 · 6.8 MEDIUM — Integrity Validation Bypass in CryptoPro Secure Disk for BitLocker
item.description: The CPSD CryptoPro Secure Disk application boots a small Linux operating system to perform user authentication before using BitLocker to decrypt the Windows partition. The system is located on a separate unencrypted partition which can be reached by…

item.title: CVE-2025-15563 · 5.3 MEDIUM 🌩️ — Broken Access Control results in Denial of Service in NesterSoft WorkTime
item.description: Any unauthenticated user can reset the WorkTime on-prem database configuration by sending a specific HTTP request to the WorkTime server. No authorization check is applied here.

item.title: CVE-2025-15562 · 6.1 MEDIUM 🌩️ — Reflected Cross-Site Scripting in NesterSoft WorkTime
item.description: The server API endpoint /report/internet/urls reflects received data into the HTML response without applying proper encoding or filtering. This allows an attacker to execute arbitrary JavaScript in the victim's browser if the victim opens a URL prepa…

item.title: CVE-2025-15561 · 7.8 HIGH — Local Privilege Escalation in NesterSoft WorkTime
item.description: An attacker can exploit the update behavior of the WorkTime monitoring daemon to elevate privileges on the local system to NT Authority\SYSTEM. A malicious executable must be named WTWatch.exe and dropped in the C:\ProgramData\wta\ClientExe directory…

item.title: CVE-2025-15560 · 8.8 HIGH — SQL Injection in NesterSoft WorkTime
item.description: An authenticated attacker with minimal permissions can exploit a SQL injection in the WorkTime server "widget" API endpoint to inject SQL queries. If the Firebird backend is used, attackers are able to retrieve all data from the database backend. If…

item.title: CVE-2025-15559 · 9.8 CRITICAL 🌩️ — Unauthenticated OS Command Injection in NesterSoft WorkTime
item.description: An unauthenticated attacker can inject OS commands when calling a server API endpoint in NesterSoft WorkTime. The server API call to generate and download the WorkTime client from the WorkTime server is vulnerable in the “guid” parameter. This allows…

item.title: CVE-2025-15574 · 6.5 MEDIUM 🌩️ — Insecure Credential Generation for Solax Power Pocket WiFi models MQTT Cloud Connection
item.description: When connecting to the Solax Cloud MQTT server the username is the "registration number", which is the 10 character string printed on the SolaX Power Pocket device / the QR code on the device. The password is derived from the "registration number" us…

item.title: CVE-2025-15575 · 5.3 MEDIUM 🌩️ — Missing Firmware Authenticity Checks in Solax Power Pocket WiFi models
item.description: The firmware update functionality does not verify the authenticity of the supplied firmware update files. This allows attackers to flash malicious firmware update files on the device. Initial analysis of the firmware update functionality does not sho…

item.title: CVE-2025-15573 · 9.4 CRITICAL 🌩️ — Missing Certificate Validation for Solax Power Pocket WiFi models MQTT Cloud Connection
item.description: The affected devices do not validate the server certificate when connecting to the SolaX Cloud MQTTS server hosted in the Alibaba Cloud (mqtt001.solaxcloud.com, TCP 8883). This allows attackers in a man-in-the-middle position to act as the legitimate…

item.title: CVE-2026-24071 · 7.8 HIGH — XPC Client Validation via PID leading to Local Privilege Escalation in Native Instruments Native Access
item.description: It was found that the XPC service offered by the privileged helper of Native Access uses the PID of the connecting client to verify its code signature. This is considered insecure and can be exploited by PID reuse attacks. The connection handler func…

item.title: CVE-2026-24070 · 8.8 HIGH — Local Privilege Escalation via DYLIB Injection in Native Instruments Native Access
item.description: During the installation of the Native Access application, a privileged helper `com.native-instruments.NativeAccess.Helper2`, which is used by Native Access to trigger functions via XPC communication like copy-file, remove or set-permissions, is deplo…

item.title: CVE-2025-59109 · 5.1 MEDIUM — UART Leaking Sensitive Data in dormakaba registration unit 9002
item.description: The dormakaba registration units 9002 (PIN Pad Units) have an exposed UART header on the backside. The PIN pad is sending every button press to the UART interface. An attacker can use the interface to exfiltrate PINs. As the devices are explicitly bu…

item.title: CVE-2025-59108 · 9.2 CRITICAL 🌩️ — Weak Default Passwords in dormakaba access manager
item.description: By default, the password for the Access Manager's web interface, is set to 'admin'. In the tested version changing the password was not enforced.

item.title: CVE-2025-59107 · 8.5 HIGH — Static Firmware Encryption Password in dormakaba access manager
item.description: Dormakaba provides the software FWServiceTool to update the firmware version of the Access Managers via the network. The firmware in some instances is provided in an encrypted ZIP file. Within this tool, the password used to decrypt the ZIP and extra…

item.title: CVE-2025-59106 · 8.8 HIGH — Web Server Running with Root Privileges in dormakaba access manager
item.description: The binary serving the web server and executing basically all actions launched from the Web UI is running with root privileges. This is against the least privilege principle. If an attacker is able to execute code on the system via other vulnerabilit…

item.title: CVE-2025-59105 · 7 HIGH — Unencrypted Flash Storage in dormakaba access manager
item.description: With physical access to the device and enough time an attacker can desolder the flash memory, modify it and then reinstall it because of missing encryption. Thus, essential files, such as "/etc/passwd", as well as stored certificates, cryptographic k…

item.title: CVE-2025-59104 · 7 HIGH — Unlocked Bootloader in dormakaba access manager
item.description: With physical access to the device and enough time an attacker is able to solder test leads to the debug footprint (or use the 6-Pin tag-connect cable). Thus, the attacker gains access to the bootloader, where the kernel command line can be changed.…

item.title: CVE-2025-59103 · 9.2 CRITICAL 🌩️ — Weak Default Passwords for SSH Access in dormakaba access manager
item.description: The Access Manager 92xx in hardware revision K7 is based on Linux instead of Windows CE embedded in older hardware revisions. In this new hardware revision it was noticed that an SSH service is exposed on port 22. By analyzing the firmware of the dev…

item.title: CVE-2025-59102 · 6.9 MEDIUM — Secrets Stored in Plaintext in Database in dormakaba access manager
item.description: The web server of the Access Manager offers a functionality to download a backup of the local database stored on the device. This database contains the whole configuration. This includes encrypted MIFARE keys, card data, user PINs and much more. The…

item.title: CVE-2025-59101 · 7.7 HIGH 🌩️ — Insufficient Session Management in dormakaba access manager
item.description: Instead of typical session tokens or cookies, it is verified on a per-request basis if the originating IP address has once successfully logged in. As soon as an authentication request from a certain source IP is successful, the IP address is handled…

item.title: CVE-2025-59100 · 5.9 MEDIUM 🌩️ — Unauthenticated Access to the SQLite Database in dormakaba access manager
item.description: The web interface offers a functionality to export the internal SQLite database. After executing the database export, an automatic download is started and the device reboots. After rebooting, the exported database is deleted and cannot be accessed an…

item.title: CVE-2025-59099 · 8.8 HIGH 🌩️ — Unauthenticated Path Traversal in dormakaba access manager
item.description: The Access Manager is using the open source web server CompactWebServer written in C#. This web server is affected by a path traversal vulnerability, which allows an attacker to directly access files via simple GET requests without prior authenticati…

item.title: CVE-2025-59098 · 8.7 HIGH 🌩️ — Trace Functionality Leaking Sensitive Data in dormakaba access manager
item.description: The Access Manager is offering a trace functionality to debug errors and issues with the device. The trace functionality is implemented as a simple TCP socket. A tool called TraceClient.exe, provided by dormakaba via the Access Manager web interface,…

item.title: CVE-2025-59097 · 9.3 CRITICAL 🌩️ — Unauthenticated SOAP API in dormakaba access manager
item.description: The exos 9300 application can be used to configure Access Managers (e.g. 92xx, 9230 and 9290). The configuration is done in a graphical user interface on the dormakaba exos server. As soon as the save button is clicked in exos 9300, the whole configu…

item.title: CVE-2025-59096 · 4.6 MEDIUM — Weak Default Password in dormakaba Kaba exos 9300
item.description: The default password for the extended admin user mode in the application U9ExosAdmin.exe ("Kaba 9300 Administration") is hard-coded in multiple locations as well as documented in the locally stored user documentation.

item.title: CVE-2025-59095 · 6.8 MEDIUM — Hard-coded Key for PIN Encryption in dormakaba Kaba exos 9300
item.description: The program libraries (DLL) and binaries used by exos 9300 contain multiple hard-coded secrets. One notable example is the function "EncryptAndDecrypt" in the library Kaba.EXOS.common.dll. This algorithm uses a simple XOR encryption technique combine…

item.title: CVE-2025-59094 · 8.4 HIGH — Local Privilege Escalation in dormakaba Kaba exos 9300 System management
item.description: A local privilege escalation vulnerability has been identified in the Kaba exos 9300 System management application (d9sysdef.exe). Within this application it is possible to specify an arbitrary executable as well as the weekday and start time, when t…

item.title: CVE-2025-59093 · 8.5 HIGH — Insecure Password Derivation Function for Database Administrator in dormakaba Kaba exos 9300
item.description: Exos 9300 instances are using a randomly generated database password to connect to the configured MSSQL server. The password is derived from static random values, which are concatenated to the hostname and a random string that can be read by every us…

item.title: CVE-2025-59092 · 8.7 HIGH 🌩️ — Unauthenticated RPC Service in dormakaba Kaba exos 9300
item.description: An RPC service, which is part of exos 9300, is reachable on port 4000, run by the process FSMobilePhoneInterface.exe. This service is used for interprocess communication between services and the Kaba exos 9300 GUI, containing status information about…
